seo.title: Karthikeyan | Software Engineer
seo.description: Software engineer building fast, reliable product interfaces and practical web systems.
seo.footerNote: Built as a static Astro site with performance-first defaults.

hero.name: Karthikeyan
hero.summary: I build dependable web products with a bias for clarity, fast interfaces, and maintainable systems. Based in San Francisco and open to focused product engineering work.

about.title: Engineer for product teams that care about speed and polish.
paragraphs: I work across frontend, backend, and deployment workflows, with a preference for small, well-tested systems that stay understandable as they grow.
My focus is practical engineering: fast pages, thoughtful UX details, clear data flow, and code that another engineer can safely change later.

highlights.label: 3+ years shipping
highlights.description: Production web apps and product surfaces

highlights.label: San Francisco, CA
highlights.description: Open to remote and hybrid teams

techStack.title: A stack chosen for durable product delivery.

bullets: Led frontend architecture for a SaaS platform serving 50K+ users.
Built a component library and improved performance by 40%.
Developed end-to-end features for a fintech product.
Implemented real-time data pipelines and responsive dashboards.
Built client websites and internal tools.
Shipped features with React, Node.js, and cloud deployments.

featuredProject.title: CloudDash Analytics
featuredProject.summary: A real-time analytics dashboard for cloud infrastructure monitoring. Built with React, D3.js, and WebSocket for live data streaming. Handles 10K+ data points per second with smooth visualizations.

items.title: DevFlow
items.summary: A developer productivity tool with GitHub integration, task tracking, and automated workflows.

items.title: LinguaChat
items.summary: AI-powered language learning app with real-time conversation practice and progress tracking.

items.title: PixelForge
items.summary: Browser-based image editor with layer support, filters, and collaborative editing features.
